title: Javier Emmanuel Anguiano Pita
text:

Actualmente, soy investigador postdoctoral en el Programa de Doctorado en Estudios Económicos (DEEC) de la Universidad de Guadalajara (UDG), trabajando bajo la supervisión de Antonio Ruiz Porras. Tengo un doctorado en Estudios Económicos y una maestría en Economía de la misma universidad.
Mis intereses de investigación se centran en la intersección de la economía internacional, la macroeconomía y la econometría aplicada. Actualmente trabajo en el papel de la integración comercial y financiera en la transmisión internacional de shocks, los efectos heterogéneos de la política monetaria entre los estados de México y el análisis del desempeño macroeconómico regional y nacional.



I am currently a postdoctoral fellow at the University of Guadalajara (UDG) Doctoral Program in Economic Studies (DEEC), working under the supervision of Antonio Ruiz Porras. I have a Ph.D. in Economic Studies and an MSc in Economics from the same institution
My research interest lie in the intersection of international economics, macroeconomics and applied econometrics. I am currently working on the role of trade and financial integration in the international transmission of shocks, the heterogeneous effects of monetary policy across Mexican states, and the analysis of regional and national macroeconomic performance.

title: Curriculum Vitae
text:
EDUCATION
Doctor of Philosophy – Econometrics and Business Statistics  Monash University Aug 2021 — Present

New principles and methods for complex data preparation and integration, with applications to official statistics, web-scrapped data and satellite raster images
Monash Data Futures Institute PhD Top-Up Scholarship (2021-2024)
Expected submission date: Nov 2024

title: Curriculum Vitae
text:
WORK EXPERIENCE

Data Scientist
Freelance, Multiple Clients Jan 2020 – June 2021
Providing data collection, pre-processing, exploratory analysis and modelling services to clients in the early R&D stages of developing data driven products. Projects include:

Data description and preliminary product feasibility insights for a start-up real estate bond platform; including assessing suitability of various property transaction databases for use in initial product prototype.
Development of statistical anomaly detection regimes and key historical insights from internet quality time-series data for use in parametric insurance products, including documenting analysis tools in an R package.

title: Curriculum Vitae
text:
PRESENTATIONS AND WORKSHOPS

Talk: Misadventures with Reproducibility in R (30 Nov 2022, R Ladies Melbourne Meetup)
Talk: Designing R Packages (4 Oct 2022, Monash EBS Data Science Research Software Study Group)
Talk: Quarto Websites as Research Compendiums (16 Aug 2022, Monash EBS Data Science Research Software Study Group)
Workshop: Writing academic papers with Rmarkdown and friends (9 Aug 2022, Monash University)
